mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ITEM( ITEM_NUM, ITEM_NAME, PRICE, ITEM_INTRO, PART, ORIGIN, IS_GIFT_SET, ITEM_STATUS ) VALUES(#{itemNum}, #{itemName}, #{price}, #{itemIntro}, #{part}, #{origin}, #{isGiftSet}, 'ACTIVE')

INSERT INTO ITEM_IMG(ORIGIN_IMG_NAME, ATTACHED_IMG_NAME, ITEM_NUM, IS_MAIN) VALUES
(#{itemImg.originImgName}, #{itemImg.attachedImgName}, #{itemImg.itemNum}, #{itemImg.isMain})
mapper.select: SELECT ITEM.ITEM_NUM , ITEM_NAME , PRICE , ATTACHED_IMG_NAME , REG_DATE , REVIEW_AVG , COALESCE(REVIEW_CNT, 0) AS REVIEW_CNT , DISCOUNT_RATE , IS_ON_SALE , IS_GIFT_SET , ITEM_STATUS , ( SELECT MEM_NAME FROM SHOP_MEMBER WHERE MEM_ROLE = 'ADMIN' AND MEM_ID = 'admin' ) SELLER FROM item INNER JOIN item_img IMG ON item.ITEM_NUM = IMG.ITEM_NUM LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ITEM_NUM, COUNT(*) AS REVIEW_CNT FROM review GROUP BY ITEM_NUM ) R ON ITEM.ITEM_NUM = R.ITEM_NUM WHERE IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ITEM_STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC

SELECT ITEM.ITEM_NUM , ITEM_NAME , PRICE , PART , ORIGIN , ATTACHED_IMG_NAME , IS_MAIN , ITEM_INTRO , REG_DATE , REVIEW_AVG , DISCOUNT_RATE , IS_ON_SALE , IS_GIFT_SET , ITEM_STATUS , ( SELECT MEM_NAME FROM SHOP_MEMBER WHERE MEM_ROLE = 'ADMIN' AND MEM_ID = 'admin' ) SELLER FROM item INNER JOIN item_img IMG ON item.ITEM_NUM = IMG.ITEM_NUM WHERE item.ITEM_NUM = #{itemNum}

SELECT ITEM.ITEM_NUM , ITEM_NAME , PRICE , ATTACHED_IMG_NAME , REG_DATE , REVIEW_AVG , DISCOUNT_RATE , IS_ON_SALE , IS_GIFT_SET , ITEM_STATUS , COALESCE(REVIEW_CNT, 0) AS REVIEW_CNT , ( SELECT MEM_NAME FROM SHOP_MEMBER WHERE MEM_ROLE = 'ADMIN' AND MEM_ID = 'admin' ) SELLER FROM item INNER JOIN item_img IMG ON item.ITEM_NUM = IMG.ITEM_NUM LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ITEM_NUM, COUNT(*) AS REVIEW_CNT FROM review GROUP BY ITEM_NUM ) R ON ITEM.ITEM_NUM = R.ITEM_NUM WHERE IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND IS_ON_SALE = TRUE AND DISCOUNT_RATE > 0 AND ITEM_STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY DISCOUNT_RATE DESC, REG_DATE DESC

SELECT ITEM.ITEM_NUM , ITEM_NAME , PRICE , ATTACHED_IMG_NAME , REG_DATE , REVIEW_AVG , COALESCE(REVIEW_CNT, 0) AS REVIEW_CNT , DISCOUNT_RATE , IS_ON_SALE , IS_GIFT_SET , ITEM_STATUS , ( SELECT MEM_NAME FROM SHOP_MEMBER WHERE MEM_ROLE = 'ADMIN' AND MEM_ID = 'admin' ) SELLER FROM item INNER JOIN item_img IMG ON item.ITEM_NUM = IMG.ITEM_NUM LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ITEM_NUM, COUNT(*) AS REVIEW_CNT FROM review GROUP BY ITEM_NUM ) R ON ITEM.ITEM_NUM = R.ITEM_NUM WHERE IS_MAIN = 'Y' ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
